data.body: LANDED via Gerrit. Gerrit change 646 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/646) — LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 (CI green) — merged to main as commit 80a4a152b ('speed up gerrit-verify: darkish-melodious-cuscus: enable pip caching on all setup-python steps'). origin/main contains 80a4a152b. Cache-hit will be observable on the next CI run over an unchanged pyproject.toml (operator-attested AC).
